title: Christmas Creepers
body:
**Merry Christmas!**

This pack changes the basic texture of creepers making them feel more alive and modern, as well as new Christmas variants!
Currently, there are 9 creeper variants including the basic one and 3 hats (4 if you include none :) )
The textures and hats are random, allowing for 36 different combinations! Something I haven't made before, cuz I didn't know how xD There is like nothing about it.

I'm also thinking of making a texture-pack that completely overhauls creepers, similar to this one.

Entity Texture Features and Entity Model Features OR Optifine are required. If anything breaks with Optifine, let me know.
If you wanna use any textures from this pack for a public project, ask me for permission first. You can use it for personal use freely. You are free to view or even extract the zip file, as long as you don't use any of the original files in your project


This applies only to 9Minecraft and other stealers: Do NOT touch this!

That will be it, bye :D
